name: Game Manager
description: Core game state management singleton. Handles game flow (start, pause, resume, game over), scene transitions, and global game state. Use this as the central hub for game-wide events and state.

game_started.description: Emitted when a new game session begins

game_paused.description: Emitted when the game is paused

game_resumed.description: Emitted when the game is unpaused

game_over.description: Emitted when game over state is triggered

scene_changed.description: Emitted after a scene transition completes

is_paused.description: Current pause state of the game

current_scene.description: Path to the currently loaded scene

game_data.description: Global game data accessible from anywhere

start_game.description: Initialize and start a new game session

pause_game.description: Pause the game and show pause menu

resume_game.description: Resume the game from paused state

toggle_pause.description: Toggle between paused and unpaused states

trigger_game_over.description: Trigger game over state with optional reason

set_data.description: Store data in the global game_data dictionary

get_data.description: Retrieve data from the global game_data dictionary

usage_example:
# Access from anywhere via singleton
GameManager.start_game()
GameManager.set_data("score", 100)
var score = GameManager.get_data("score", 0)
